narrative:
03 congressional district has 530,650 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.4 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +9.0% D−R vs +15.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
